content: Google Maps API cost management: (1) Field masking is critical — request only needed fields; opening hours fields (regularOpeningHours, currentOpeningHours) trigger Enterprise SKU which is most expensive tier. (2) Cache Place Details responses for up to 30 days per ToS. (3) Use Routes API Compute Route Matrix for bulk travel time calculation — supports 625 total elements per request. (4) Set QPD quotas in GCP console and budget alerts at 50/75/90%. (5) Rate limit: 3000 QPM. (6) Use server-side proxy in Next.js API routes to protect API key and add caching layer. (7) Batch geocoding before individual place detail calls to minimize round trips.
